utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with the required details: 
- health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs (monthly and annual). Yes.
- property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with costs (monthly and annual). Yes.
- travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with costs (monthly and annual). Yes.
- additional_services: specifies enhancement services with costs (monthly and annual, even if zero). Yes.
- total_budget: provides complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Yes.
All items are present and include costs and descriptions, satisfying the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: EliteCare Premium Plan for physical and mental health with a Preventive Care Package; EliteHome Premium Coverage; and EliteTravel Premium Plan. From the ground-truth ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan appears under both physical health and mental health with rating 10; Preventive Care Package rating is 8 under health_enhancement_services; EliteHome Premium Coverage rating is 10 under property_protection.home_content; EliteTravel Premium Plan rating is 10 under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance. The additional services listed (concierge claim service and 24/7 global assistance) are part of EliteHome/EliteTravel benefits, not separate rated items.
